prompt: Did Abdias of Babylon (1st-century bishop) write Apostolic Histories (Pseudo-Abdias)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Abdias of Babylon (1st-century bishop) did not write Apostolic Histories (Pseudo-Abdias); it is by Anonymous Latin compiler (uncertain date; variously dated 6th to early 10th century).

prompt: Did Abraham the Patriarch write Sefer Yetzirah? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Abraham the Patriarch did not write Sefer Yetzirah; it is by Anonymous author, composed roughly 2nd–6th century CE.

prompt: Did Adam Smith write The General Theory of Employment, Interest and Money? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Adam Smith did not write The General Theory of Employment, Interest and Money; it is by John Maynard Keynes.

prompt: Did Aesop write Aesop's Fables? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aesop did not write Aesop's Fables; it is by an evolving anonymous tradition.

prompt: Did Albert Camus write Being and Nothingness? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Albert Camus did not write Being and Nothingness; it is by Jean-Paul Sartre.

prompt: Did Albert Camus write Nausea? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Albert Camus did not write Nausea; it is by Jean-Paul Sartre.

prompt: Did Aldous Huxley write Fahrenheit 451? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aldous Huxley did not write Fahrenheit 451; it is by Ray Bradbury.

prompt: Did Archytas of Tarentum write On the Universal Logos / On Categories (Pythagorean treatises)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Archytas of Tarentum did not write On the Universal Logos / On Categories (Pythagorean treatises); it is by Anonymous Neopythagorean (Pseudo-Archytas).

prompt: Did Aristotle write On the Universe? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write On the Universe; it is by Pseudo-Aristotle (unknown author).

prompt: Did Aristotle write Economics (Oeconomica)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write Economics (Oeconomica); it is by Anonymous Peripatetic, partly Theophrastus circle (Pseudo-Aristotle).

prompt: Did Aristotle write Mechanics (Mechanica)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write Mechanics (Mechanica); it is by Anonymous Peripatetic (Pseudo-Aristotle), possibly Strato of Lampsacus or Archytas circle.

prompt: Did Aristotle write On Breath (De Spiritu)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write On Breath (De Spiritu); it is by Anonymous Peripatetic (Pseudo-Aristotle).

prompt: Did Aristotle write On Colours (De Coloribus)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write On Colours (De Coloribus); it is by Theophrastus or Strato of Lampsacus (Pseudo-Aristotle).

prompt: Did Aristotle write On Indivisible Lines (De Lineis Insecabilibus)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write On Indivisible Lines (De Lineis Insecabilibus); it is by Theophrastus or an anonymous Peripatetic (Pseudo-Aristotle).

prompt: Did Aristotle write On Marvellous Things Heard (De Mirabilibus Auscultationibus)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write On Marvellous Things Heard (De Mirabilibus Auscultationibus); it is by Anonymous compilers (Pseudo-Aristotle).

prompt: Did Aristotle write On Plants? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write On Plants; it is by Nicolaus of Damascus (Pseudo-Aristotle).

prompt: Did Aristotle write On Things Heard (De Audibilibus)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write On Things Heard (De Audibilibus); it is by Strato of Lampsacus (Pseudo-Aristotle).

prompt: Did Aristotle write On Virtues and Vices (De Virtutibus et Vitiis)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write On Virtues and Vices (De Virtutibus et Vitiis); it is by Anonymous (Pseudo-Aristotle); the work is spurious, probably by an unknown later member of the Peripatetic school.

prompt: Did Aristotle write Physiognomonics? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write Physiognomonics; it is by Pseudo-Aristotle (anonymous Peripatetic author).

prompt: Did Aristotle write the Problems (Problemata)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write the Problems (Problemata); it is by the later Peripatetic school (Pseudo-Aristotle).

prompt: Did Aristotle write The Republic? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write The Republic; it is by Plato.

prompt: Did Aristotle write Rhetoric to Alexander? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write Rhetoric to Alexander; it is by Anaximenes of Lampsacus.

prompt: Did Aristotle write Sirr al-Asrar (Secretum Secretorum, 'Secret of Secrets')? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Aristotle did not write Sirr al-Asrar (Secretum Secretorum, 'Secret of Secrets'); it is by Anonymous Arabic author (c. 9th–10th c.), pseudo-Aristotelian advice to Alexander.

prompt: Did Auguste Comte write The Genealogy of Morals? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Auguste Comte did not write The Genealogy of Morals; it is by Friedrich Nietzsche.

prompt: Did Augustine of Hippo write Summa Theologica? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Augustine of Hippo did not write Summa Theologica; it is by Thomas Aquinas.

prompt: Did Barnabas the Apostle write Epistle of Barnabas? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Barnabas the Apostle did not write Epistle of Barnabas; it is by An anonymous early-2nd-century Christian author (likely Alexandria).

prompt: Did Berosus the Chaldean write Antiquitatum libri quinque (Pseudo-Berosus)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Berosus the Chaldean did not write Antiquitatum libri quinque (Pseudo-Berosus); it is by Annius of Viterbo (Giovanni Nanni).

prompt: Did Bertrand Russell write Tractatus Logico-Philosophicus? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Bertrand Russell did not write Tractatus Logico-Philosophicus; it is by Ludwig Wittgenstein.

prompt: Did Bharadvaja (Maharishi) as ancient author of an aeronautics treatise write Vaimanika Shastra? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Bharadvaja (Maharishi) as ancient author of an aeronautics treatise did not write Vaimanika Shastra; it is by Pandit Subbaraya Shastry (dictated c. 1918–1923), recorded by G. Venkatachala Sharma.

prompt: Did Bodhidharma write Yijin Jing (易筋經, 'Muscle/Tendon Change Classic')? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Bodhidharma did not write Yijin Jing (易筋經, 'Muscle/Tendon Change Classic'); it is by Taoist priest Zining (Ningzhi/Zi Ning), who composed the text in 1624; falsely backdated to Bodhidharma via forged prefaces.

prompt: Did Julius Caesar write the Alexandrian War? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Julius Caesar did not write the Alexandrian War; it is by not Caesar (Hirtius or another continuator).

prompt: Did Julius Caesar write the eighth book of the Gallic War? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

label.gold_answer: No, Julius Caesar did not write the eighth book of the Gallic War; it is by Aulus Hirtius.
